attacking_style: Favors 'stealth attacks' on gravel sectors, accelerating when rivals are marking each other rather than launching obvious long-range moves. Strikes within technical sections, not at obvious landmarks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data for pattern identification. Appears to exploit reactive racing by others rather than relying on heavy team setup.
terrain_preference: Gravel/strade bianche sectors are optimal terrain. Proven ability to win solo from technical accelerations on unpaved surfaces. Multiple Strade Bianche victories confirm specialization.
vulnerability: May struggle when opponents race proactively and aggressively rather than reactively. Stealth tactics require rivals watching each other.
key_patterns: Attacks within gravel sectors, not at sector entrances/exits—timing based on rival inattention
Second Strade Bianche win indicates repeatable execution of gravel-specific race craft
Exploits tactical stalemates; accelerates when peloton is reactive rather than aggressive
form_trajectory: unknown: Single race context insufficient to determine trajectory, though win confirms technical gravel capabilities remain sharp
